description_long: This is a tall, rectangular mirror with a dark reflective surface encased in a medium-brown wooden frame. The frame is simple and unadorned, with clean, straight edges and a smooth finish, giving it a minimalist and modern appearance. The back of the mirror features a horizontal support bar and a slot, likely for wall mounting or stabilization. The sides of the mirror are narrow, emphasizing its slim profile. The reflective surface appears to be of high clarity, suitable for full-length viewing. The overall construction suggests durability and suitability for both residential and commercial urban environments.
description: A tall, rectangular mirror with a minimalist wooden frame and a clear, dark reflective surface, designed for full-length viewing.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full reflective surface bordered by a medium-brown wooden frame.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the slim, narrow profile of the mirror and the thickness of the wooden frame.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden back panel, a horizontal support bar, and a mounting slot.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the thinness and straight edges of the frame.
attribute_frame_design: Rectangular, minimalist wooden frame in medium brown with smooth, straight edges and no decorative elements.
